headline: A Fresh Look At Aflac (AFL) Valuation As Investor Interest Picks Up
summary: Why Aflac (AFL) is on investors’ radar today Aflac (AFL) has been drawing attention after recent share performance that includes a small gain over the past month and a modest advance in the past 3 months, prompting closer scrutiny of its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Aflac. At a share price of $114.85, Aflac’s recent 7 day share price return is slightly negative, while its 1 year total shareholder return of 15.01% highlights stronger momentum over a longer period.
